provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Energy and Environmental Engineering Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records the 63 unique explicit course codes across Engineering Fundamental Courses, Required Courses and three bounded Area Elective lists. Students must complete five Area Electives for at least 15 credits, including at least one course from Area 1 and at least one course from Area 2. COMP1022P, CENG4160 and MECH4902 remain because the intake-specific PDF explicitly lists them, while noting their last offering and subsequent deletion. ENEG4000 has official variable 1-4 credits, so its local credits value is unknown rather than assuming either endpoint. ENEG3910 retains the intake PDF title and 3-credit value, with the published Fall 2027-28 title and credit change kept as a note. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
